goal: Repair openclaw-benben vNext group Memory V4 visibility so group chats can recall relevant memory by default unless a strict privacy decision such as never_quote or a subject mismatch blocks it.

synthetic_live_contract.mode: in-process synthetic turn on NAS using live runtime files and a fake Memory V4 adapter
checks: unknown direct sender keeps memory_recall_allowed=false and does not call Memory V4
ordinary group owner sender allows Memory V4 recall and replies from the memory result
direct_only group recall uses the matching subject rather than trusting group viewer alone
never_quote remains allowed only as internal_only

behavior_contract: project_group, couple_group, and ordinary_group normal answers can call Memory V4.
direct_only atoms can emit in group scopes only when subject_entity_id or allowed_direct_subject_ids matches the atom subject.
relationship_only atoms can emit in groups by default when relationship refs match or the atom carries a relationship ref.
never_quote atoms remain internal_only and must not be directly emitted.
unknown direct senders remain blocked from memory recall.
V2/V3/projections/transcripts/raw archives remain rejected as answer truth surfaces.
